phrases: before we push this, check security
run a security check before push
intentPatterns: performing a pre-push AI security review before code goes to GitHub
checking for AI/security/privacy risk before publishing code
triggering security guardrails when code publication is requested
auditing tool and data-risk posture ahead of release
proactiveConditions: a user asks to push code to GitHub
a user asks to run git push
a pull request is being finalized for publication
security review has not yet been run in the current code publication flow
